title: She's not the goal
caption:
She's not the goal.

Most men looking hard for a wife are looking for rescue. They want to feel chosen. To feel less alone. That's not love — that's need wearing love's face. A woman worth marrying can smell it.

Boaz wasn't scanning the room. He was at work. Running his fields well. Treating his workers with fairness. Ruth showed up in his field while he was already being the man he was supposed to be. The character produced the encounter. Not the search.

"He who finds a wife finds a good thing." — Proverbs 18:22

The Hebrew word for "find" means to encounter — to come upon. Not to hunt. To arrive in the right place, being the right man, and come upon something good. You can't manufacture the encounter. You can become the man it happens to.

She's not waiting on your testimony. She's watching how you handle money, honor your mom, treat the server, and treat the man who embarrasses you. Your character is your actual pitch. The man who talks about God but can't govern himself is the loudest thing she'll walk away from.

Become him first.

—

Comment "first" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

theme: He chases God, not a wife.
